title: Plan a coverage model from the spec
description: Derive covergroups and cross coverage from the specification so coverage measures real features, not incidental toggles.
body: Use when starting verification planning for a new design. Do not auto-generate coverage from signal toggles alone, since that measures activity rather than meaningful behavior. Actions: extract the spec's features and corner cases, define covergroups and crosses for them, and verify the model maps to the verification plan. Validation signals include every spec feature traced to a coverpoint and crosses capturing interacting conditions. Risk boundary: a coverage model missing a spec feature leaves it unverified, so escalate gaps to the verification plan owner before closure.
